---
title: "Conferences"
pagetitle: "Conferences | Mesfin Genie"
title-block-style: none
page-layout: full
description: "Upcoming and recent conference presentations and published conference abstracts by Mesfin Genie."
image: /assets/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell"><p class="eyebrow">Conferences</p><h1>Presentations and abstracts</h1><p>Upcoming and recent research presentations, followed by published conference abstracts.</p></div></header>
<section class="content-section"><div class="page-shell narrow"><h2>Upcoming presentations</h2><div class="event-list"><article class="event-card"><div class="event-date">20-22 July 2026</div><div><h3>Attribute ordering, attention and choice in a discrete choice experiment</h3><p>International Conference on Choice Modelling · Gold Coast, Australia</p></div><span class="event-status">Conference paper</span></article><article class="event-card"><div class="event-date">5-7 October 2026</div><div><h3>Preferences for dementia support programmes in Australia</h3><p>International Academy of Health Preference Research · Duke-NUS, Singapore</p></div><span class="event-status">Podium</span></article></div><h2>Recent presentations</h2><div class="event-list"><article class="event-card"><div class="event-date">15-17 June 2026</div><div><h3>Choice modelling and vaccine-policy research</h3><p>Choice Modelling Centre Conference · Melbourne, Australia</p></div><span class="event-status">Presentation</span></article><article class="event-card"><div class="event-date">18 May 2026</div><div><h3>Choosing with concern for the worse-off</h3><p>ISPOR 2026 · Philadelphia, United States</p></div><span class="event-status">Poster</span></article></div><h2>Published conference abstracts</h2><div class="event-list"><article class="publication-record"><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2025.09.2491" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">PCR18 Are Discrete Choice Experiment Results Robust to Omitted Attributes?</a></h3><div class="publication-authors"><strong>Mesfin Genie</strong>; Verity Watson; Stéphane Luchini; Michaël Schwarzinger</div><div class="publication-meta"><span><em>Value in Health</em>, 28, S549-S550</span><span class="status-tag">Published abstract</span></div><div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2025.09.2491" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">doi:10.1016/j.jval.2025.09.2491</a></div></article><article class="publication-record"><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2025.04.1296" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">MSR145 Do Framing and Attribute Number Influence Choice Consistency?</a></h3><div class="publication-authors"><strong>Mesfin Genie</strong>; Surachat Ngorsuraches</div><div class="publication-meta"><span><em>Value in Health</em>, 28, S302-S303</span><span class="status-tag">Published abstract</span></div><div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2025.04.1296" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">doi:10.1016/j.jval.2025.04.1296</a></div></article><article class="publication-record"><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2024.03.1508" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">MSR75 Guidance or Misdirection?</a></h3><div class="publication-authors"><strong>Mesfin Genie</strong>; Shelby Reed; Juan Gonzalez; Semra Ozdemir</div><div class="publication-meta"><span><em>Value in Health</em>, 27, S274</span><span class="status-tag">Published abstract</span></div><div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2024.03.1508" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">doi:10.1016/j.jval.2024.03.1508</a></div></article><article class="publication-record"><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2023.03.1037" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">EPH155 Relative Effectiveness of Vaccination and Non-pharmaceutical Interventions</a></h3><div class="publication-authors">Asmita P. Khatiwada; Aregawi G. Gebremariam; <strong>Mesfin Genie</strong>; Tim C. Lai; Nabin Poudel; Surachat Ngorsuraches</div><div class="publication-meta"><span><em>Value in Health</em>, 26, S192-S193</span><span class="status-tag">Published abstract</span></div><div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2023.03.1037" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">doi:10.1016/j.jval.2023.03.1037</a></div></article><article class="publication-record"><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2023.03.1873" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">PCR95 Decision Consistency in a Discrete Choice Experiment</a></h3><div class="publication-authors"><strong>Mesfin Genie</strong>; Surachat Ngorsuraches; Nabin Poudel</div><div class="publication-meta"><span><em>Value in Health</em>, 26, S329</span><span class="status-tag">Published abstract</span></div><div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2023.03.1873" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">doi:10.1016/j.jval.2023.03.1873</a></div></article></div></div></section>
```
